_comment_recycling: Recycling preferences control how stale objects are discovered and prioritized

RecyclingPreferences._comment: Set PreferRecycling to true to prioritize using existing objects over creating new ones
Set RecyclingOnly to true to refuse deployment if no recyclable objects are found
Only recycle objects older than this many days (prevents recycling recently disabled accounts)
Don't recycle objects older than this (may indicate ancient, possibly still-referenced objects)

SafetyFilters._comment: Exclude these OUs from recycling - use wildcards with DC=*
Regex patterns - never recycle users matching these patterns
